title: Wano’s Long Night Begins to Break
description: On pages 22–24, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: It's wet? That must be from earlier:..!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can wash away the soap and its effects with water!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you figured out how to remove the Golden AWA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I will not simply stand by and let you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll blow it all away with a gust of wind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It's no good... my strength is...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: helped to get rid of those annoying bubbles on my body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: putting on a brave face, huh... well, if that's what you want,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll gladly blow you away until you die!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not the lame magic show it once was!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah! Such a thin cloud won't give birth to lightning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: My goal is to bring about condensation!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
